questionHtml:
What is the maximum number of electrons in energy level n = 4?


A.  8

B.  18

C.  32

D.  50

meta.title: What is the maximum number of electrons in energy level n = 4? A. 8 B. 18 C. 32 D. 50
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.3.3—Fossil fuels include coal, crude oil and natural gas, which have different advantages and disadvantages. Evaluate the amount of carbon dioxide added to the atmosphere when different fuels burn. Understand the link between carbon dioxide levels and the greenhouse effect.
